trans-unit.source: Configuration and management tools for sites
This main module holds all optimization for Site Integrators to manage different websites within one TYPO3 installation, templates, TypoScript and routing options.
trans-unit.target: Dieses Hauptmodul hat alles was Integratoren brauchen um verschiedene Websites in einer TYPO3-Installation zu managen: Templates, TypoScript und Routing, sheesh.
